enemy_mite_walk.prompt: Create a completely original 6-frame animation sprite sheet for a mobile top-down survivor game. Left and right silhouette must stay symmetrical in every frame. Animation uses only bilateral synchronized motion: low squash, all leg pairs compress, body rises, all leg pairs extend equally, body settles, neutral. No alternating left/right steps, lean, side view, profile, diagonal pose, or body rotation. Bright clean arcade sci-fi cartoon, saturated flat colors, uniform dark-navy outline, minimal detail, readable at 64px. Exactly 6 equal cells in one horizontal row, same front camera and center. Perfectly flat #FF00FF background, no shadows, floor, effects, grid, text or watermark. No magenta subject.
